expectations.text: Mentions iterating over URLs in a loop or batch processing pattern
expectations.evidence: Shows Python for loop: for url in urls: try...except...continue, collecting successes and failures

expectations.text: Recommends try/except per paper for resilience (equivalent to --continue-on-error)
expectations.evidence: Shows try/except Exception as e pattern inside the loop, failures.append((url, str(e))), continue

expectations.text: Explains how to re-run or debug individual failures
expectations.evidence: Collects failures list, prints FAILED: url — err at the end, and mentions the CLI --continue-on-error prints per-paper errors

expectations.text: References the batch workflow from the skill or shows composable step functions
expectations.evidence: Imports PipelineContext.from_config(), download_paper, extract_paper_text, run_pipeline from paper_tool modules
